text:
On Tue, Jan 09, 2001 at 12:05:37PM -0800, Joseph Scott wrote:
> 	I noticed the warning about -b being depreciated, but wasn't
> familiar with the history of it so I left it.  If I come across any more
> in the future I will be sure to remove them.

Leave it in; it is a FreeBSD 3.x compatibility-ism.

-- 
wca
